completeness_check.method: Out-of-band CI job parses the SOA-Harness Core specification, extracts every MUST by stable anchor (§X.Y#slug), diffs against must_coverage keys. Missing anchors fail CI. Tool: scripts/verify-must-coverage.ts in the soa-validate repo.
invariants: Every MUST anchor in the spec appears as a key in must_coverage.
Every test_id referenced from must_coverage exists in tests.
Every test_id referenced from execution_order.phases exists in tests.
No test in tests is orphaned (unreferenced from both must_coverage and execution_order).
Range/glob shorthand is forbidden; all arrays are literal.

profiles.core: Mandatory for every SOA-Harness v1.0 implementation.

severity_scale.critical: Failing this test blocks any conformance claim.
severity_scale.moderate: Failing weakens conformance and must be cited in the compliance report; implementer may still ship with a documented waiver.
severity_scale.minor: Quality-of-conformance signal; does not block certification.

test_categories.SV-PRIN: Core Principles — lean design, failure paths, primitive testability, FS-grounded, composition (§4).
test_categories.SV-STACK: Required stack completeness and primitive resolution (§5).
test_categories.SV-BOOT: External bootstrap root: SDK-pinned, operator-bundled, or DNSSEC TXT (§5.3).
test_categories.SV-SIGN: Per-artifact JWS signing profile: Agent Card, program.md, MANIFEST (§6.1.1).
test_categories.SV-AUDIT: Audit chain observability (tail hash + records + chain integrity, §10.5.2/§10.5.3).

HR-01.name: Destructive approval
HR-01.milestone_reason: M3 — destructive-tool-without-Prompt denial is a core §10.3 capability-lattice + §15 verification regression. Testable via existing /permissions/resolve + pinned Tool Registry fixtures shipped in M1.

HR-02.name: Budget exhaustion pre-call
HR-02.summary: Projection over budget → StopReason::BudgetExhausted before API call.
HR-02.milestone_reason: M3 — §13 Token Budget shipped here. Previously deferred in L-14; now actively in scope via L-33 §13.5 budget projection endpoint.

HR-03.name: Budget exhaustion mid-stream
HR-03.milestone_reason: M3 — harness regression suite for M3-shipped subsystems (Memory/Budget/Stream/Hooks/Gateway).

HR-04.name: Crash recovery (pending tool)
HR-04.summary: phase=pending tool replays idempotently on resume.
HR-04.milestone_reason: M2 crash-safe persistence (§12) + audit-sink degradation (§10.5.1) scope.

HR-05.name: Crash recovery (committed)
HR-05.summary: phase=committed tool does NOT replay on resume.
HR-05.milestone_reason: M2 crash-safe persistence (§12) + audit-sink degradation (§10.5.1) scope.

HR-06.name: Compaction integrity
HR-06.summary: Post-compaction conversation is prefix-equivalent and memory push occurred.
HR-06.milestone_reason: M3 — harness regression suite for M3-shipped subsystems (Memory/Budget/Stream/Hooks/Gateway).

HR-07.name: Agent-type enforcement
HR-07.milestone_reason: M3 — harness regression suite for M3-shipped subsystems (Memory/Budget/Stream/Hooks/Gateway).

HR-08.name: SI quality gate
HR-08.summary: Reject when training delta positive but holdout delta < −0.02.
HR-08.milestone_reason: M5 — depends on §9 Self-Improvement runtime OR §17 A2A Handoff infrastructure, both deferred to M5.

HR-09.name: SI marker escape
HR-09.summary: Diff editing bytes outside EDITABLE SURFACES is rejected.
HR-09.milestone_reason: M3 — harness regression suite for M3-shipped subsystems (Memory/Budget/Stream/Hooks/Gateway).

HR-10.name: SI immutable task
HR-10.summary: Diff touching /tasks/ is rejected with ImmutableTargetEdit.
HR-10.milestone_reason: M3 — harness regression suite for M3-shipped subsystems (Memory/Budget/Stream/Hooks/Gateway).

HR-11.name: Permission override tighten-only
HR-11.summary: toolRequirements attempting to loosen is rejected.
HR-11.milestone_reason: M3 — harness regression suite for M3-shipped subsystems (Memory/Budget/Stream/Hooks/Gateway).

HR-12.name: Card signature failure
HR-12.summary: Tampered Card bytes → CardInvalid; Runner fails closed.
HR-12.milestone_reason: M1 — Tampered Card JWS → CardInvalid; shipped via L-16 tampered-card fixture + validator V2-09 subprocess harness. Retroactive tag per L-33 rev 2.

HR-13.name: Tool Pool stale on resume
HR-13.milestone_reason: M3 — harness regression suite for M3-shipped subsystems (Memory/Budget/Stream/Hooks/Gateway).

HR-14.name: Audit hash chain
HR-14.summary: Any prev_hash tamper fails chain verification.
HR-14.milestone_reason: M2 — Chain-tamper verification via /audit/records (L-15) + validator-side mutation check (V2-10). Retroactive tag per L-33 rev 2.

HR-15.name: Handoff auth
HR-15.summary: A2A handoff with invalid/expired JWT is rejected (-32002).
HR-15.milestone_reason: M5 — depends on §9 Self-Improvement runtime OR §17 A2A Handoff infrastructure, both deferred to M5.

HR-16.name: Docker profile
HR-16.summary: Task attempting seccomp-blocked syscall fails within container; HR-16 is SI-gated because §9.7 applies only to the self-improvement loop.
HR-16.milestone_reason: M5 — depends on §9 Self-Improvement runtime OR §17 A2A Handoff infrastructure, both deferred to M5.

HR-17.name: Memory degradation
HR-17.milestone_reason: M3 — harness regression suite for M3-shipped subsystems (Memory/Budget/Stream/Hooks/Gateway).

HR-18.name: Config precedence
HR-18.summary: self_optimize() arg loosening Card is rejected with ConfigPrecedenceViolation.
HR-18.milestone_reason: M5 — depends on §9 Self-Improvement runtime OR §17 A2A Handoff infrastructure, both deferred to M5.

SV-PRIN-01.name: Lean single-agent baseline
SV-PRIN-01.assertion: Runner advertises a single-agent design; any multi-agent deployment carries an explicit §22 Non-Goals waiver in the Agent Card or deployment manifest.

SV-PRIN-02.name: Failure paths defined
SV-PRIN-02.assertion: Every failure path (crash, token exhaustion, permission denial, stream interruption, upstream unavailability, rollback failure) maps to a named outcome in §16 Cross-Interaction Matrix; absence of a defined outcome fails the test.

SV-PRIN-03.name: Primitives unit-testable
SV-PRIN-03.assertion: Each primitive P1–P14 is exercised by at least one SV-* test that runs in isolation (no transitive dependency on another primitive's state).

SV-PRIN-04.name: File-system grounded
SV-PRIN-04.assertion: Primary source of truth for sessions, audit trail, AGENTS.md, /tasks/, program.md resides on the file system; databases act only as secondary stores (cache, index) and MUST NOT be the sole authoritative copy.

SV-PRIN-05.name: Composition specified
SV-PRIN-05.assertion: For every pair of primitives whose composition is observable (e.g., self-improvement × handoff, compaction × streaming), §16 defines the composition rule.

SV-STACK-01.name: Stack completeness
SV-STACK-01.assertion: Agent Card declares self_improvement, memory, permissions, compaction, tokenBudget, observability, security objects (self_improvement MAY be disabled via enabled:false).

SV-STACK-02.name: Primitive endpoints resolve
SV-STACK-02.assertion: P1–P10 and P12–P14 each resolve to a concrete file, endpoint, or code path advertised in the Card or well-known locations; P11 required only under core+handoff.

SV-BOOT-01.name: SDK-pinned bootstrap
SV-BOOT-01.assertion: When the SDK-pinned channel is declared, the Runner refuses to load any Agent Card whose security.trustAnchors[].publisher_kid does not match the SDK-pinned value; HostHardeningInsufficient(reason=bootstrap-missing) emitted.
SV-BOOT-01.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-BOOT category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-BOOT-02.name: Operator-bundled bootstrap
SV-BOOT-02.assertion: When the operator-bundled channel is declared, initial-trust.json is loaded at startup before any Agent Card; absence fails startup with HostHardeningInsufficient(reason=bootstrap-missing).
SV-BOOT-02.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-BOOT category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-BOOT-03.name: DNSSEC TXT bootstrap
SV-BOOT-03.assertion: When the DNSSEC channel is declared, the Runner resolves _soa-trust.<domain> TXT, requires the AD bit, and treats empty / unvalidated results as HostHardeningInsufficient(reason=bootstrap-missing).
SV-BOOT-03.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-BOOT category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-BOOT-04.name: Bootstrap key rotation + compromise
SV-BOOT-04.assertion: Runner polls bootstrap channel at ≤ 24 h interval; on revoked publisher_kid observation it rejects Agent Cards referencing the revoked value with HostHardeningInsufficient(reason=bootstrap-revoked), halts SI, and flags all MANIFEST JWS accepted in the preceding 24 h as SuspectDecision. Rotation overlap ≥ 30 d honored during transition.
SV-BOOT-04.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-BOOT category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-BOOT-05.name: Anchor disagreement / split-brain
SV-BOOT-05.assertion: SOA_BOOTSTRAP_CHANNEL is the sole authoritative source; a disagreeing publisher_kid observed on any non-authoritative channel triggers HostHardeningInsufficient(reason=bootstrap-split-brain), SI halt, and rejection of Agent Cards whose security.trustAnchors[].publisher_kid matches the dissenting value. Multi-channel agreement does not trigger. Recovery requires removing the dissenting artifact or rotating the authoritative channel per §5.3.1.
SV-BOOT-05.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-BOOT category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-BOOT-06.name: initial-trust.json schema conformance
SV-BOOT-06.assertion: For operator-bundled deployments, initial-trust.json validates against schemas/initial-trust.schema.json (required fields soaHarnessVersion='1.0', publisher_kid, spki_sha256 matching /^[A-Fa-f0-9]{64}$/, issuer); validation failure fails startup with HostHardeningInsufficient(reason=bootstrap-missing).
SV-BOOT-06.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-BOOT category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-SIGN-01.name: Agent Card JWS profile
SV-SIGN-01.assertion: Agent Card JWS uses detached serialization over JCS(agent-card.json), alg ∈ {EdDSA,ES256,RS256≥3072}, typ=soa-agent-card+jws, header carries kid and x5c; mismatch → CardSignatureFailed.
SV-SIGN-01.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-SIGN category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-SIGN-02.name: program.md JWS profile
SV-SIGN-02.assertion: program.md JWS is detached over the raw UTF-8 bytes (NOT JCS), alg ∈ {EdDSA,ES256}, typ=soa-program+jws.
SV-SIGN-02.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-SIGN category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-SIGN-03.name: MANIFEST JWS profile
SV-SIGN-03.assertion: MANIFEST.json.jws is detached over JCS(MANIFEST.json), alg ∈ {EdDSA,ES256} (RS256 forbidden), typ=soa-manifest+jws, header.kid equals the configured publisher_kid.
SV-SIGN-03.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-SIGN category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-SIGN-04.name: x5c chain depth and ordering
SV-SIGN-04.assertion: Agent Card JWS x5c header is an RFC 7515 §4.1.6 array ordered leaf-first (index 0 = signing cert) including every intermediate certificate required to chain to an anchor in security.trustAnchors; trust-anchor root MAY be omitted. Verifiers reject leaf-only x5c with CardSignatureFailed(reason=x5c-chain-incomplete) when an intermediate is missing from the anchor store.
SV-SIGN-04.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-SIGN category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-SIGN-05.name: program.md two-step signer resolution
SV-SIGN-05.assertion: Verifier computes SHA-256 over DER bytes of x5c[0] and rejects mismatch with x5t#S256 header as CardSignatureFailed(reason=x5t-thumbprint-mismatch). Separately, verifier walks the x5c chain and rejects chains whose terminal SPKI does not match any security.trustAnchors[].spki_sha256 with CardSignatureFailed(reason=chain-anchor-mismatch). The two checks are disjoint preconditions.
SV-SIGN-05.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-SIGN category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-A2A-10.name: A2A JWT algorithm allowlist
SV-A2A-10.assertion: A2A JWT alg ∈ {EdDSA,ES256,RS256}; RS256 requires key size ≥ 3072; any other alg rejected with HandoffRejected(reason=bad-alg).
SV-A2A-10.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-11.name: A2A signing-key discovery
SV-A2A-11.assertion: A2A JWT signing key matches either (a) the caller's Agent Card JWS signer kid (same trust anchor, same SPKI) or (b) the SPKI of the caller's mTLS client certificate with the x5t#S256 header present.
SV-A2A-11.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-12.name: A2A jti replay cache
SV-A2A-12.assertion: Receiver rejects a repeated jti within exp+30s (= 330s) from first observation with HandoffRejected(reason=jti-replay); cache MAY be per-connection (mTLS) or per-(iss,aud) keyed.
SV-A2A-12.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-13.name: A2A agent_card_etag drift
SV-A2A-13.assertion: Receiver fetches caller's Agent Card and compares its JWS digest to the presented agent_card_etag; mismatch emits CardVersionDrift and responds JSON-RPC error -32051; etag cached ≤ 60 s.
SV-A2A-13.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-14.name: A2A digest canonicalization
SV-A2A-14.assertion: messages_digest / workflow_digest / result_digest use form sha256:<64-hex-lowercase> where the hashed bytes are JCS-RFC-8785 canonical of the corresponding JSON object. Receiver recomputes and compares; mismatch → HandoffRejected(reason=digest-mismatch).
SV-A2A-14.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-ENC-01.name: UTF-8 no BOM
SV-ENC-01.assertion: Every text file defined by the spec is UTF-8 without BOM.

SV-ENC-02.name: RFC 3339 timestamps
SV-ENC-02.assertion: Every timestamp emitted in StreamEvent, audit trail, session file, and memory-note responses is RFC 3339 with explicit timezone offset and ≥ ms precision.

SV-ENC-03.name: ISO-8601 durations
SV-ENC-03.assertion: Duration fields are ISO-8601 (e.g., P30D, PT5M).

SV-ENC-04.name: LF line separators
SV-ENC-04.assertion: Persisted JSON uses LF line endings; CRLF rejected at ingest.

SV-ENC-05.name: JCS canonicalization
SV-ENC-05.assertion: Every JSON signing input (Agent Card JWS, MANIFEST JWS, PDA, audit canonical hash) is JCS-canonicalized per RFC 8785; re-serialization by verifier produces byte-identical output; RFC 8785 Appendix test vectors pass round-trip. program.md JWS is explicitly NOT included — it signs raw UTF-8 Markdown bytes per Core §1 and §6.1.1.

SV-ENC-06.name: Clock-skew JWT
SV-ENC-06.assertion: JWT iat/exp validated ±30s against verifier clock; outside window → AuthFailed.

SV-ENC-07.name: Clock-skew PDA window
SV-ENC-07.assertion: PDA not_before/not_after validated ±60s; not_after - not_before ≤ 15 minutes; outside window → HandlerKeyRevoked or equivalent.

SV-CARD-01.name: HTTPS required
SV-CARD-01.assertion: http:// URL for agent-card.json MUST be rejected.
SV-CARD-01.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-02.name: Content-Type enforced
SV-CARD-02.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-03.name: JWS signature verify
SV-CARD-03.assertion: Valid detached JWS at /.well-known/agent-card.jws required; mismatch fails closed.
SV-CARD-03.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-04.name: Trust anchor chain
SV-CARD-04.assertion: JWS signer chain MUST chain to security.trustAnchors; foreign issuer rejected.
SV-CARD-04.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-05.name: Schema validate
SV-CARD-05.assertion: Card validates against the normative JSON Schema 2020-12 artifact.
SV-CARD-05.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-06.name: soaHarnessVersion const
SV-CARD-06.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-07.name: additionalProperties false
SV-CARD-07.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-08.name: Cache-Control ≤ 300s
SV-CARD-08.assertion: Card honored max-age up to 300s only unless signer overrides.
SV-CARD-08.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-09.name: Validation failure halt
SV-CARD-09.assertion: Own Card invalid → refuse to start.
SV-CARD-09.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-10.name: Declared precedence
SV-CARD-10.assertion: Lower-precedence source attempting to loosen higher is ConfigPrecedenceViolation.
SV-CARD-10.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-CARD-11.name: ETag + If-None-Match
SV-CARD-11.assertion: Response MUST include ETag header; If-None-Match with matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified.
SV-CARD-11.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-CARD category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-AGENTS-01.name: Required H2 present
SV-AGENTS-01.assertion: Missing required H2 → AgentsMdInvalid on startup.

SV-AGENTS-06.name: Reload after SI accept
SV-AGENTS-06.assertion: AGENTS.md re-read after accepted SI iteration.
SV-AGENTS-06.milestone_reason: M5 — depends on §9 Self-Improvement runtime OR §17 A2A Handoff infrastructure, both deferred to M5.

SV-AGENTS-07.name: No mid-turn reload
SV-AGENTS-07.assertion: AGENTS.md modified mid-turn is ignored until turn end.

SV-MEM-01.name: Tool signatures
SV-MEM-01.assertion: All required memory tools discoverable with declared schemas.

SV-MEM-02.name: Loading algorithm
SV-MEM-02.assertion: Scoring + tie-break + accumulate-to-budget produces deterministic slice.

SV-MEM-03.name: Startup fail-closed
SV-MEM-03.assertion: Memory MCP unreachable at startup → MemoryUnavailableStartup.

SV-MEM-04.name: Mid-loop degrade
SV-MEM-04.assertion: Single mid-loop timeout → MemoryDegraded event, continue with stale slice.

SV-MEM-05.name: Consolidation trigger
SV-MEM-05.assertion: consolidate_memories invoked within 24h or after 100 new notes.

SV-MEM-06.name: Sharing policy enforced
SV-MEM-06.assertion: Cross-session memory query honors sharing_policy server-side.

SV-MEM-07.name: delete_memory_note idempotent
SV-MEM-07.assertion: Repeated delete of same id returns identical tombstone_id.

SV-MEM-08.name: Tombstone audit
SV-MEM-08.assertion: Tombstone retains id/tags/dates but not note body; excluded from search.

SV-SI-01.name: program.md schema
SV-SI-01.assertion: Missing required H2 in program.md → rejected.
SV-SI-01.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-02.name: program.md JWS required
SV-SI-02.assertion: program.md.jws missing or invalid → iteration rejected.
SV-SI-02.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-03.name: Markers required
SV-SI-03.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-04.name: Immutable digest check
SV-SI-04.assertion: IMMUTABLE ADAPTER digest drift aborts iteration.
SV-SI-04.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-05.name: Benchmark mTLS auth
SV-SI-05.assertion: benchmark_mcp_endpoint without mTLS rejected; missing scope → BenchmarkAuthFailed.
SV-SI-05.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-06.name: Iteration fingerprint
SV-SI-06.assertion: Fingerprint recorded and referenced in improvement.log.
SV-SI-06.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-07.name: Holdout split stable
SV-SI-07.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-08.name: Acceptance strict-improve
SV-SI-08.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-09.name: Stage-activate ordering
SV-SI-09.assertion: pending.ptr → add_memory_note → activation.record → git fast-forward order enforced.
SV-SI-09.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-10.name: Commit signed
SV-SI-10.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-11.name: 12b failure compensation
SV-SI-11.assertion: add_memory_note succeeds, activation.record fails → delete_memory_note compensation.
SV-SI-11.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-12.name: Orphan replay
SV-SI-12.assertion: Crash after 12c → resume replays 12d; 3 failures → SelfImprovementOrphaned.
SV-SI-12.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-13.name: Docker baseline applied
SV-SI-13.assertion: Container launch includes seccomp=<profile>, no-new-privileges, user-namespace remapping. Disaggregated sub-tests SV-SI-19..SV-SI-26 assert each individual flag.
SV-SI-13.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-14.name: Docker unavailable closed
SV-SI-14.assertion: Docker daemon down → DockerUnavailable, no host execution.
SV-SI-14.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-15.name: Image digest-pinned
SV-SI-15.assertion: Task with tag-only image reference rejected.
SV-SI-15.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-16.name: results.tsv format
SV-SI-16.assertion: Header verbatim; aggregation mean; fail/error count as 0.0.
SV-SI-16.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-17.name: Max iterations terminal
SV-SI-17.assertion: max_iterations reached → SelfImprovementMaxIterations with best-so-far summary.
SV-SI-17.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-18.name: program.md trust-anchor chain
SV-SI-18.assertion: program.md.jws signer chains to security.trustAnchors; foreign issuer → iteration rejected.
SV-SI-18.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-19.name: --read-only rootfs
SV-SI-19.assertion: Container launched with --read-only; write to rootfs returns EROFS.
SV-SI-19.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-20.name: --cap-drop=ALL
SV-SI-20.assertion: All capabilities dropped; CAP_SYS_ADMIN operations fail.
SV-SI-20.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-21.name: User-namespace remap
SV-SI-21.assertion: --user=65534:65534 with user-namespace remap; host UID/GID 0 never appears inside container.
SV-SI-21.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-22.name: --pids-limit enforced
SV-SI-22.assertion: Container fork bomb hits task.resources.pids limit; fails to exhaust host.
SV-SI-22.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-23.name: No swap
SV-SI-23.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-24.name: docker.sock not mounted
SV-SI-24.assertion: /var/run/docker.sock does not appear in container mount table.
SV-SI-24.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-25.name: Env scrubbed
SV-SI-25.assertion: Host env not visible in container; only task.json.env entries pass through.
SV-SI-25.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-26.name: Mount allowlist + watchdog
SV-SI-26.assertion: Only /inputs (ro) and /output (rw) mounted; wall-clock timeout SIGKILLs container at task.resources.wall_clock_seconds.
SV-SI-26.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-27.name: Host unprivileged userns disabled
SV-SI-27.assertion: Before launching any benchmark container, Runner verifies one of: sysctl user.max_user_namespaces=0, sysctl kernel.unprivileged_userns_clone=0, or an AppArmor/SELinux policy that denies userns_create. Absence raises HostHardeningInsufficient and aborts.
SV-SI-27.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-28.name: clone3 allowed, flags defended
SV-SI-28.assertion: clone3 is permitted by the seccomp profile; a process attempting clone3(CLONE_NEWUSER) inside the container fails with EPERM because the host sysctl denies unprivileged user-namespace creation.
SV-SI-28.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-29.name: Manifest JWS verify + digest
SV-SI-29.assertion: Runner fetches release manifest, verifies JWS against publisher_kid, recomputes SHA-256 of JCS-canonicalized soa-harness-profile-v1.json bytes, compares to manifest. Mismatch → ManifestDigestMismatch; container launch refused.
SV-SI-29.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-30.name: Manifest schema validates
SV-SI-30.assertion: Retrieved manifest validates against release-manifest.schema.json; additionalProperties=false.
SV-SI-30.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-31.name: self_optimize args defaulted from Card
SV-SI-31.assertion: Every runner.self_optimize() argument (safety_gates, docker_isolation, stage_activate, git_commit_policy, etc.) has a corresponding field in Agent Card self_improvement object; invocation without Card default sources fails precedence.
SV-SI-31.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-SI-32.name: clone arg filter blocks NEWNS
SV-SI-32.assertion: clone(CLONE_NEWNS) from inside a Harbor benchmark container fails with EPERM (seccomp clone-arg filter blocks namespace-creation flags on x86_64/aarch64/riscv64).
SV-SI-32.milestone_reason: M5 — §9 Self-Improvement runtime. Per master plan.

SV-AGENTS-08.name: AGENTS.md entrypoint matches Card
SV-AGENTS-08.assertion: AGENTS.md ## Self-Improvement Policy contains entrypoint: <path>; the same value equals Agent Card self_improvement.entrypoint_file; mismatch raises AgentsMdInvalid.

SV-PERM-01.name: Capability lattice
SV-PERM-01.assertion: ReadOnly rejects Mutating; WorkspaceWrite rejects Destructive. Vector path: schema validation of test-vectors/permission-prompt/ PDA-JWS and canonical-decision bundle. Live path: validator issues GET /permissions/resolve per §10.3.1 across the pinned Tool Registry and asserts decision=CapabilityDenied for (ReadOnly, Mutating) and (WorkspaceWrite, Destructive) pairs; asserts not-a-side-effect property by reading audit-log tail hash before and after the query batch.
SV-PERM-01.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-02.name: Resolution precedence
SV-PERM-02.assertion: Default → toolRequirements → policyEndpoint; each may only tighten.
SV-PERM-02.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-03.name: Autonomous escalation
SV-PERM-03.assertion: Autonomous handler facing high-risk MUST escalate; 30s silence → deny.
SV-PERM-03.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-04.name: HITL == Interactive
SV-PERM-04.assertion: Coordinator/Autonomous signature does not satisfy HITL for high-risk.
SV-PERM-04.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-05.name: Audit chain prev_hash
SV-PERM-05.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-06.name: WORM sink append-only
SV-PERM-06.assertion: Configured sink rejects mutation/deletion via Runner creds.
SV-PERM-06.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-07.name: WORM external timestamp
SV-PERM-07.assertion: Sink-issued timestamp present and within 1s of UTC.
SV-PERM-07.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-08.name: Handler key rotation 90d
SV-PERM-08.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-09.name: CRL refresh hourly
SV-PERM-09.assertion: Revoked kid → HandlerKeyRevoked within 1 hour of CRL publish.
SV-PERM-09.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-10.name: Rotation overlap ≥ 24h
SV-PERM-10.assertion: Old and new kid both accepted during ≥24h overlap.
SV-PERM-10.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-11.name: Key-type enforcement
SV-PERM-11.assertion: Only Ed25519, ECDSA P-256, or RSA ≥3072 accepted; other algorithms rejected at enrollment.
SV-PERM-11.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-12.name: kid uniqueness
SV-PERM-12.assertion: Enrolling a kid already in use is rejected; kid uniqueness enforced across handlers.
SV-PERM-12.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-13.name: HSM / keystore storage
SV-PERM-13.assertion: Private key material not present in any on-disk file readable by the Runner process.
SV-PERM-13.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-14.name: Runner CRL refresh SLA
SV-PERM-14.assertion: Runner refreshes CRL at least once per 60 minutes; a newly-published CRL with a revoked kid is honored on the next refresh. The issuer-side 60-minute revocation obligation composes to an end-to-end ≤ 120-minute SLA; SV-PERM-14 measures the Runner-side refresh interval only.
SV-PERM-14.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-15.name: SuspectDecision flagging
SV-PERM-15.assertion: Audit records signed by compromised kid in 24h preceding revocation are flagged SuspectDecision.
SV-PERM-15.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-18.name: CRL artifact schema
SV-PERM-18.assertion: CRL fetched from <trust-anchor-uri>/crl.json validates against crl.schema.json; past not_after with no fresh refresh, new high-risk decisions rejected with HandlerKeyRevoked(reason=crl-stale).
SV-PERM-18.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PRIV-01.name: Data inventory present
SV-PRIV-01.assertion: docs/data-inventory.md exists; enumerates per-primitive fields that MAY carry personal data with retention category and asserted legal basis. Absence fails conformance.

SV-PRIV-02.name: data_class tagging + sensitive-class block
SV-PRIV-02.assertion: Personal-data-carrying fields tagged with data_class ∈ {public,internal,confidential,personal,sensitive-personal} via x-soa-data-class. Untagged fields default to 'internal'. Memory consolidation of a 'sensitive-personal' entry emits MemoryDeletionForbidden(reason=sensitive-class-forbidden).

SV-PRIV-03.name: Subject delete + export tools
SV-PRIV-03.assertion: MCP tools privacy.delete_subject and privacy.export_subject are exposed. delete produces memory tombstones, SubjectSuppression audit record, and session-body tombstones. export returns JCS-canonical {memory,audit,sessions} with suppressed entries rendered as redacted stubs.

SV-PRIV-04.name: Retention sweep
SV-PRIV-04.assertion: Runner runs a retention sweep at least every 24 h; records past category horizon are tombstoned (memory, session-body) or redacted-on-export (audit-personal); audit-integrity records are never destructively deleted.

SV-PRIV-05.name: Residency layered defence
SV-PRIV-05.assertion: When security.data_residency is non-empty: every MCP tool invocation MUST carry a tool-declared data_processing_location intersecting the pinned set; cryptographic attestation (if available) MUST match the declaration; deployments relying solely on DNS/SNI/reverse-lookup network signals are non-conformant. Every residency-gated decision emits an audit record with declared_location, attested_location, network_signal_regions, decision.

SV-OPS-01.name: Liveness endpoint
SV-OPS-01.assertion: GET /health returns 200 with {status:'alive', soaHarnessVersion:'1.0'} within 5 s on both Runner and Gateway. Endpoint reachable under rate-limit saturation; no session or audit data in body.

SV-OPS-02.name: Readiness endpoint
SV-OPS-02.assertion: GET /ready returns 200 with {status:'ready'} only when bootstrap resolved, tool pool consistent, persistence directory writable within 100 ms, audit sink reachable within 1 s, CRL fresh. Failure returns 503 with reason ∈ {bootstrap-pending, tool-pool-initializing, persistence-unwritable, audit-sink-unreachable, crl-stale}.

SV-PERM-19.name: Audit-sink three-state degradation
SV-PERM-19.assertion: Runner operates healthy/degraded-buffering/unreachable-halt states. degraded: local fsync-backed buffer; AuditSinkDegraded emitted once per transition; /ready still 200. unreachable-halt: Mutating/Destructive tools rejected with PermissionDenied(reason=audit-sink-unreachable); ReadOnly permitted; /ready flips 503; AuditSinkUnreachable emitted. Recovery flushes buffer in order, resumes this_hash chain, emits AuditSinkRecovered.
SV-PERM-19.milestone_reason: M2 crash-safe persistence (§12) + audit-sink degradation (§10.5.1) scope.

SV-SESS-11.name: Tool idempotency retention floor
SV-SESS-11.assertion: Every tool in the pool declares idempotency_retention_seconds ≥ max(3600, session resume-grace window, session max lifetime up to 24 h). Tools declaring < 3600 s whose risk_class is not Destructive MUST be rejected at pool assembly with ToolPoolStale(reason=idempotency-retention-insufficient).
SV-SESS-11.milestone_reason: M2 §12.3 atomic-write + §12.5 resume + §12.2 idempotency floor scope. Validator plan v2 covers via V2-06/V2-07/V2-08/V2-09/V2-10.

SV-PERM-16.name: WORM retention tiers
SV-PERM-16.assertion: DangerFullAccess sessions retained ≥ 365 days; other sessions ≥ 90 days.
SV-PERM-16.milestone_reason: External WORM sink retention + audit-reader access require external infrastructure (S3 Object Lock, Azure Blob immutable, etc.) that operators deploy in-band. M2 uses local file:// append-only as substitute; full WORM conformance defers to M3 alongside the operator-deployment story.

SV-PERM-17.name: Audit-reader access
SV-PERM-17.assertion: Read-only verifier credentials can list/read records without write authority.
SV-PERM-17.milestone_reason: External WORM sink retention + audit-reader access require external infrastructure (S3 Object Lock, Azure Blob immutable, etc.) that operators deploy in-band. M2 uses local file:// append-only as substitute; full WORM conformance defers to M3 alongside the operator-deployment story.

SV-REG-01.name: list_tools metadata-only
SV-REG-01.assertion: list_tools returns only metadata; no invocation side effects.

SV-REG-02.name: MCP name pattern
SV-REG-02.assertion: mcp__[server]__[tool] pattern enforced; foreign chars percent-encoded or rejected.

SV-REG-03.name: Pool pinned per session
SV-REG-03.assertion: Tools added mid-session do not appear in in-flight pool.

SV-REG-04.name: Deny list from AGENTS.md
SV-REG-04.section_title: Per-Session Tool Pool + AGENTS.md Source Path Test Hook
SV-REG-04.assertion: Runner started with SOA_RUNNER_AGENTS_MD_PATH=test-vectors/agents-md-denylist/AGENTS.md (§11.2.1 hook). GET /tools/registered.tools[] excludes the denied name (fs_write_dangerous from the fixture's ### Deny section) regardless of activeMode.

SV-REG-05.name: list_tools field shape
SV-REG-05.assertion: Each entry exposes exactly { name, description, input_schema, risk_class, default_control }; missing or extra fields fail.

SV-SESS-01.name: Session schema
SV-SESS-01.milestone_reason: M2 crash-safe persistence (§12) + audit-sink degradation (§10.5.1) scope.

SV-SESS-02.name: status enum closed
SV-SESS-02.assertion: Non-enum status value → SessionFormatIncompatible on load.
SV-SESS-02.milestone_reason: M2 crash-safe persistence (§12) + audit-sink degradation (§10.5.1) scope.

SV-SESS-03.name: Event bracketing
SV-SESS-03.assertion: pending→committed bracket observed for every significant event.
SV-SESS-03.milestone_reason: M2 crash-safe persistence (§12) + audit-sink degradation (§10.5.1) scope.

SV-SESS-04.name: Idempotency key
SV-SESS-04.assertion: Replayed tool receives identical idempotency key; dedupes.
SV-SESS-04.milestone_reason: M2 crash-safe persistence (§12) + audit-sink degradation (§10.5.1) scope.

SV-SESS-05.name: Non-idempotent = Destructive
SV-SESS-05.assertion: Tool lacking idempotency MUST be classified Destructive with control=Prompt.
SV-SESS-05.milestone_reason: M2 crash-safe persistence (§12) + audit-sink degradation (§10.5.1) scope.

SV-SESS-06.name: POSIX atomic write
SV-SESS-06.assertion: Crash after fsync+rename produces exactly-one consistent file.
SV-SESS-06.milestone_reason: M2 §12.3 atomic-write + §12.5 resume + §12.2 idempotency floor scope. Validator plan v2 covers via V2-06/V2-07/V2-08/V2-09/V2-10.

SV-SESS-07.name: Windows atomic write
SV-SESS-07.assertion: Crash across MoveFileExW produces exactly-one consistent file.
SV-SESS-07.milestone_reason: M2 §12.3 atomic-write + §12.5 resume + §12.2 idempotency floor scope. Validator plan v2 covers via V2-06/V2-07/V2-08/V2-09/V2-10.

SV-SESS-08.name: Resume replays pending
SV-SESS-08.milestone_reason: M2 §12.3 atomic-write + §12.5 resume + §12.2 idempotency floor scope. Validator plan v2 covers via V2-06/V2-07/V2-08/V2-09/V2-10.

SV-SESS-09.name: Card-drift terminates
SV-SESS-09.assertion: Card version changed mid-session → StopReason::CardVersionDrift on resume.
SV-SESS-09.milestone_reason: M2 §12.3 atomic-write + §12.5 resume + §12.2 idempotency floor scope. Validator plan v2 covers via V2-06/V2-07/V2-08/V2-09/V2-10.

SV-SESS-10.name: Inflight compensation
SV-SESS-10.assertion: phase=inflight on resume → compensating action if tool supports; else mark compensated with ResumeCompensationGap note.
SV-SESS-10.milestone_reason: M2 §12.3 atomic-write + §12.5 resume + §12.2 idempotency floor scope. Validator plan v2 covers via V2-06/V2-07/V2-08/V2-09/V2-10.

SV-BUD-01.name: Projection algorithm
SV-BUD-01.assertion: p95*1.15 with W default 10; cold-start baseline 4096 min.

SV-BUD-02.name: Pre-call halt
SV-BUD-02.assertion: Over-budget projection → no API call issued.

SV-BUD-03.name: Mid-stream cancel
SV-BUD-03.assertion: Overage observed mid-stream → cancel on next ContentBlockDelta boundary.
SV-BUD-03.milestone_reason: M4 — cancellation on next ContentBlockDelta boundary requires real LLM streaming with delta-boundary arithmetic; beyond M3 impl scope (L-37 retag, same class as SV-STR-11).

SV-BUD-04.name: Cache accounting
SV-BUD-04.assertion: Cached input counted at 10% unless provider-advertised ratio overrides.

SV-BUD-05.name: Billing tag propagated
SV-BUD-05.assertion: billingTag present on OTel resource, audit record, events.

SV-BUD-06.name: StopReason closed enum
SV-BUD-06.assertion: Unknown StopReason value rejected by soa-validate.

SV-BUD-07.name: BillingTagMismatch detected
SV-BUD-07.assertion: Session billing_tag differing from Agent Card raises BillingTagMismatch.

SV-STR-01.name: StreamEvent schema
SV-STR-01.assertion: Every emitted event validates; type ∈ closed enum of 27 (§14.1 + §19.4 errata adding PreToolUseOutcome + PostToolUseOutcome).

SV-STR-02.name: Sequence monotonic
SV-STR-02.assertion: sequence is strictly increasing per session.

SV-STR-04.name: CrashEvent final position
SV-STR-04.assertion: On crash, CrashEvent is the last event with workflow_state_id set.

SV-STR-05.name: System Event Log categories
SV-STR-05.assertion: Every record has category from closed list.

SV-STR-06.name: OTel span names
SV-STR-06.section_title: OpenTelemetry Mapping + OTel Span Observability Channel
SV-STR-06.assertion: GET /observability/otel-spans/recent (§14.5.2) returns spans including name=soa.turn + name=soa.tool.<tool_name> with required attributes (soa.session.id, soa.turn.id, soa.billing.tag, soa.agent.name, soa.agent.version for turn; soa.tool.risk_class, soa.permission.decision for tool). StreamEvent.event_id appears as span event.

SV-STR-07.name: OTel required resource
SV-STR-07.section_title: OpenTelemetry Mapping + OTel Span Observability Channel
SV-STR-07.assertion: Two-part: (a) Runner started with observability.requiredResourceAttrs missing → /ready probe returns 503 with reason per §5.4; (b) Runner started with all required attrs → GET /observability/otel-spans/recent (§14.5.2) returns spans whose resource_attributes include every name listed in observability.requiredResourceAttrs.

SV-STR-08.name: Exporter backpressure
SV-STR-08.section_title: OpenTelemetry Mapping + Observability Backpressure Status Endpoint
SV-STR-08.assertion: Flood OTel exporter with unreachable collector; poll GET /observability/backpressure (§14.5.3); assert buffer_capacity=10000, dropped_since_boot > 0 after flood, last_backpressure_applied_at > test-start, Runner /ready still 200 (does not halt).

SV-STR-09.name: Per-type payload schema
SV-STR-09.assertion: Every event's payload validates against stream-event-payloads.schema.json for its declared type.

SV-STR-10.name: CrashEvent payload shape
SV-STR-10.assertion: CrashEvent.payload contains required fields reason, workflow_state_id, last_committed_event_id, stack_hint.

SV-STR-11.name: CompactionDeferred
SV-STR-11.assertion: Compaction trigger while ContentBlockDelta open → CompactionDeferred emitted, no mid-block compaction.
SV-STR-11.milestone_reason: M4 — mid-ContentBlockDelta compaction trigger requires real LLM dispatcher streaming, beyond M3 impl scope (L-36 retag).

SV-STR-12.name: Runner stream endpoint + mTLS
SV-STR-12.assertion: Runner serves /stream/v1/{session_id} over TLS 1.3 with mTLS; bearer scope stream:read:<session_id> required; unauthenticated or unsigned requests rejected.
SV-STR-12.milestone_reason: M4 — requires §14.3 full SSE transport with mTLS + bearer + Last-Event-ID resume semantics. M3 ships §14.5 polling-friendly minimum; full SSE transport is M4.

SV-STR-13.name: Last-Event-ID resume
SV-STR-13.assertion: Reconnecting client sends Last-Event-ID; Runner resumes from next sequence or returns 409 {error:"ResumeGap"} when past buffer horizon.
SV-STR-13.milestone_reason: M4 — requires §14.3 full SSE transport with mTLS + bearer + Last-Event-ID resume semantics. M3 ships §14.5 polling-friendly minimum; full SSE transport is M4.

SV-STR-14.name: Stream backpressure
SV-STR-14.assertion: Client > 10000 events behind head → Runner emits terminal SSE event `event: soa-terminate` with `data: {"error":"ConsumerLagging"}` and then closes the underlying HTTP response (SSE has no WebSocket-style close frame); buffer floor 50k/1h enforced; ceiling 500k/24h enforced.
SV-STR-14.milestone_reason: M4 — requires §14.3 full SSE transport with mTLS + bearer + Last-Event-ID resume semantics. M3 ships §14.5 polling-friendly minimum; full SSE transport is M4.

SV-STR-15.name: Stream event mapping
SV-STR-15.assertion: stream-event-payloads.schema.json has top-level oneOf dispatch; every emitted event validates (including PermissionPrompt with additionalProperties:false).

SV-STR-16.name: Trust-class determinism
SV-STR-16.assertion: Gateway chooses trust_class deterministically from workflow.status (and signer_kid for PermissionDecision); no payload inspection for trust selection.
SV-STR-16.milestone_reason: M4 — trust_class enforcement observation requires Gateway surface (§14.1.2 is a Runner-side static mapping; decision-and-render happens at Gateway, not Runner). L-36 retag.

SV-HOOK-04.name: Exit-code table
SV-HOOK-04.assertion: 0,1,2,3 behave per spec; other codes → HookAbnormalExit.

SV-HOOK-05.name: replace_args honored
SV-HOOK-05.assertion: PreToolUse replace_args modifies tool invocation; observable via PreToolUseOutcome StreamEvent (§14.1 + §19.4 errata) with outcome=replace_args and args_digest_before ≠ args_digest_after. Resolver re-invocation MUST substitute replaced args before fingerprinting.

SV-HOOK-06.name: replace_result honored
SV-HOOK-06.assertion: PostToolUse replace_result modifies recorded tool result; observable via PostToolUseOutcome StreamEvent (§14.1 + §19.4 errata) with outcome=replace_result and output_digest_before ≠ output_digest_after.

SV-HOOK-07.name: Step-5 ordering
SV-HOOK-07.assertion: GET /events/recent shows lifecycle ordering: PermissionDecision → PreToolUseOutcome → ToolResult → PostToolUseOutcome → Audit/Persist, observable via sequence monotonicity on the 27-value §14.1 closed enum (PreToolUseOutcome + PostToolUseOutcome added per §19.4 errata).

SV-HOOK-08.name: No hook reentrancy
SV-HOOK-08.assertion: Hook invoking a Runner tool → HookReentrancy + session terminate.

SV-A2A-01.name: mTLS required
SV-A2A-01.assertion: TLS 1.3 with mTLS; peer cert not in trust anchors → TrustAnchorMismatch.
SV-A2A-01.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-02.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-03.name: agent.describe
SV-A2A-03.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-04.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-05.name: handoff.offer reject
SV-A2A-05.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-06.name: handoff.transfer success
SV-A2A-06.assertion: Destination starts new session with workflow.status=Handoff.
SV-A2A-06.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-07.name: State-transfer scope
SV-A2A-07.assertion: Memory/audit/session-path NOT transferred; billing_tag + messages ARE.
SV-A2A-07.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-08.name: HandoffBusy while Optim
SV-A2A-08.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-A2A-09.name: Error code set
SV-A2A-09.milestone_reason: M5 — §17 A2A Handoff. Per master plan.

SV-GOV-02.name: Stability tiers
SV-GOV-02.assertion: Companion stability-tiers.md present; Experimental fields opt-in.

SV-GOV-03.name: Migration guide on bump
SV-GOV-03.assertion: Release ships migrations/1.x-to-1.y.md when minor bumps.

SV-GOV-04.name: Deprecation lifetime
SV-GOV-04.assertion: Deprecated fields work for ≥ 2 minor releases.

SV-GOV-05.name: Errata URL reachable
SV-GOV-05.assertion: Published errata URL returns 200 with JSON-formatted errata.

SV-GOV-06.name: soa-validate pinned
SV-GOV-06.assertion: soa-validate binary digest matches release-tag manifest.

SV-GOV-07.name: Normative references pinned
SV-GOV-07.assertion: Every entry in §2 resolves to a URL/tag with an immutable digest or version. Wall-clock citations rejected.

SV-GOV-08.name: Version negotiation: empty intersection
SV-GOV-08.assertion: When a caller's and callee's supported_core_versions sets have empty intersection, the session is aborted with VersionNegotiationFailed; A2A returns JSON-RPC -32061; UI transports return ui.version-mismatch. No further traffic permitted.

SV-GOV-09.name: Version negotiation: highest-common selection
SV-GOV-09.assertion: Given an intersection {1.0, 1.1, 1.2}, the negotiated version is the highest value by (major,minor) numeric tuple — here 1.2. Lower values are not selected when higher values are present in the intersection.

SV-GOV-10.name: Version negotiation: binding on A2A
SV-GOV-10.assertion: A2A JWT carries soa_core_version claim matching the negotiated version; absent or mismatched claim → HandoffRejected(reason=version-not-negotiated).
SV-GOV-10.milestone_reason: M5 — core+handoff profile requires §17 A2A infrastructure (M5). Retagged from M3 per L-34 finding F-06.

SV-GOV-11.name: Release-build verification gate
SV-GOV-11.assertion: Release CI re-runs extract-schemas and build-manifest; schema files, MANIFEST.json content (modulo JWS signature), and test-vector digests are byte-identical to committed copies; must-maps show zero orphans; every file under schemas/ parses as JSON Schema 2020-12. Pipeline surfaces release-gate.json enumerating each of the five checks.

SV-CLUS-01.name: Local lock (default)
SV-CLUS-01.milestone_reason: M4 — §12.4 distributed coordination + fencing-token infrastructure is Gateway-adjacent (fits alongside UI Gateway shipment in M4). Retagged from M3 per L-34 finding F-07.

SV-CLUS-02.name: Distributed fencing
SV-CLUS-02.milestone_reason: M4 — §12.4 distributed coordination + fencing-token infrastructure is Gateway-adjacent (fits alongside UI Gateway shipment in M4). Retagged from M3 per L-34 finding F-07.

SV-CLUS-03.name: Token gap detection
SV-CLUS-03.assertion: Non-monotonic adjacent fencing tokens → SelfImproveFencingViolation; loop pauses.
SV-CLUS-03.milestone_reason: M4 — §12.4 distributed coordination + fencing-token infrastructure is Gateway-adjacent (fits alongside UI Gateway shipment in M4). Retagged from M3 per L-34 finding F-07.

SV-CLUS-04.name: Lease expiry rejection
SV-CLUS-04.assertion: Writer holding an expired lease rejected at commit.
SV-CLUS-04.milestone_reason: M4 — §12.4 distributed coordination + fencing-token infrastructure is Gateway-adjacent (fits alongside UI Gateway shipment in M4). Retagged from M3 per L-34 finding F-07.

SV-GOOD-04.name: Novelty quota enforced

SV-GOOD-06.name: Fingerprint audited

SV-GOOD-06.milestone_reason: M5 — depends on §9 Self-Improvement runtime OR §17 A2A Handoff infrastructure, both deferred to M5.

SV-GOOD-07.name: tasks_fingerprint reproducible
SV-GOOD-07.assertion: Given the reference test-vectors/tasks-fingerprint/ tree, a conformant Runner produces the published tasks_fingerprint string byte-for-byte: JCS of sorted-by-task_id array of {task_id, task_json_sha256 (JCS of task.json), dockerfile_sha256 (raw bytes), entrypoint_sha256 (raw bytes or 'absent')}, then SHA-256.
SV-GOOD-07.milestone_reason: M5 — depends on §9 Self-Improvement runtime OR §17 A2A Handoff infrastructure, both deferred to M5.

SV-SESS-12.name: Replay-cache / tool-idempotency disjointness
SV-SESS-12.assertion: UI §11.4.1 replay cache and §12.2 tool idempotency are implemented as disjoint subsystems with independent metrics.
SV-SESS-12.milestone_reason: M4 — asserts §12.2 tool idempotency + UI §11.4.1 prompt-nonce replay cache are disjoint mechanisms. §12.2 ships M1 but UI §11.4.1 infrastructure requires Gateway (M4).

SV-GOV-12.name: Upstream A2A major-version wire-compatibility detection
SV-GOV-12.assertion: Runner detects an upstream-A2A major-version bump that breaks any §17 wire property and refuses the peer with HandoffRejected(reason=wire-incompatibility).
SV-GOV-12.milestone_reason: M5 — status=reserved entry depends on §17 A2A. Retagged from M3 per L-34 finding F-06.

SV-AUDIT-TAIL-01.name: Audit tail observability response
SV-AUDIT-TAIL-01.assertion: GET /audit/tail returns 200 with body conforming to schemas/audit-tail-response.schema.json. On empty log, this_hash equals the literal "GENESIS" and last_record_timestamp is omitted. On non-empty log, this_hash is 64-char lowercase hex and matches the most recent record's this_hash. Reading MUST NOT append a meta-record — the endpoint is pure query.
SV-AUDIT-TAIL-01.milestone_reason: M2 — shipped and verified green during M2 execution. Retroactive tagging per L-33 rev 2 (plan-evaluator finding F-07).

SV-AUDIT-RECORDS-01.name: Audit records observability response + pagination
SV-AUDIT-RECORDS-01.assertion: GET /audit/records?after=<id>&limit=<n> returns 200 with body conforming to schemas/audit-records-response.schema.json. Records are in chain order earliest-to-latest. has_more transitions correctly as the caller paginates with next_after. Reading MUST NOT append a meta-record.
SV-AUDIT-RECORDS-01.milestone_reason: M2 — shipped and verified green during M2 execution. Retroactive tagging per L-33 rev 2 (plan-evaluator finding F-07).

SV-AUDIT-RECORDS-02.name: Audit chain integrity
SV-AUDIT-RECORDS-02.assertion: Validator reads all records via /audit/records pagination, verifies records[0].prev_hash == "GENESIS" and for all i > 0, records[i].prev_hash == records[i-1].this_hash. Any mismatch fails the assertion.
SV-AUDIT-RECORDS-02.milestone_reason: M2 — shipped and verified green during M2 execution. Retroactive tagging per L-33 rev 2 (plan-evaluator finding F-07).

SV-SESS-BOOT-01.name: Session bootstrap response + tighten-only
SV-SESS-BOOT-01.assertion: POST /sessions with requested_activeMode ≤ Agent Card's permissions.activeMode returns 201 with body conforming to schemas/session-bootstrap-response.schema.json. granted_activeMode equals requested_activeMode. session_id matches the §12.1 session-file pattern. session_bearer is opaque and authorizes /stream, /permissions/resolve, /audit/tail for exactly this session.
SV-SESS-BOOT-01.milestone_reason: M2 — shipped and verified green during M2 execution. Retroactive tagging per L-33 rev 2 (plan-evaluator finding F-07).

SV-SESS-BOOT-02.name: Session bootstrap rejects looser-than-card request
SV-SESS-BOOT-02.assertion: POST /sessions with requested_activeMode > Agent Card's permissions.activeMode returns 403 with reason=ConfigPrecedenceViolation. Agent Card activeMode is the per-deployment upper bound; session activeMode is tighten-only from that bound.
SV-SESS-BOOT-02.milestone_reason: M2 — shipped and verified green during M2 execution. Retroactive tagging per L-33 rev 2 (plan-evaluator finding F-07).

SV-PERM-20.name: Permission decision recording
SV-PERM-20.assertion: POST /permissions/decisions with valid body for an AutoAllow tool returns 201 with body conforming to schemas/permission-decision-response.schema.json. Exactly one audit record is appended; response.audit_this_hash equals the new tail hash. Decision matches what /permissions/resolve would return (forgery resistance). Error-code enum per §10.3.2: 400 reasons = {malformed-json, missing-required-field, unknown-tool, pda-malformed}; 403 reasons = {insufficient-scope, session-bearer-mismatch, pda-decision-mismatch}. ConfigPrecedenceViolation is RESERVED for §10.3 step 3 and MUST NOT be used here.
SV-PERM-20.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-21.name: PDA verification happy path
SV-PERM-21.section_title: Permission Decision Recording + Artifact Signing Profile
SV-PERM-21.assertion: POST /permissions/decisions with a tool whose resolver output is Prompt and a valid PDA whose canonical-decision.decision matches the resolver output returns 201 with handler_accepted=true. Audit record signer_key_id equals the PDA x5c[0] kid.
SV-PERM-21.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-PERM-22.name: PDA verification negative paths
SV-PERM-22.section_title: Permission Decision Recording + Artifact Signing Profile
SV-PERM-22.assertion: POST /permissions/decisions with a cryptographically-invalid PDA returns 201 with decision=Deny, handler_accepted=false, reason=pda-verify-failed AND audits the attempt. POST with a PDA whose canonical-decision.decision disagrees with the resolver computation returns 403 reason=pda-decision-mismatch with no audit record written.
SV-PERM-22.milestone_reason: M3 — core-profile completion; SV-PERM category extends M1/M2 assertions.

SV-SESS-STATE-01.name: Session state observability response
SV-SESS-STATE-01.assertion: GET /sessions/<session_id>/state returns 200 with body conforming to schemas/session-state-response.schema.json. Response reflects persisted state (not stale pre-flush in-memory state). Reading MUST NOT advance workflow state, emit StreamEvents, or append audit rows. Rate limit 120 rpm per bearer; 401/403/404/429/503 per spec.

SV-AUDIT-SINK-EVENTS-01.name: Audit-sink event channel (M2 minimum observability)
SV-AUDIT-SINK-EVENTS-01.assertion: GET /audit/sink-events returns 200 with body conforming to schemas/audit-sink-events-response.schema.json. Each event has event_id, type ∈ {AuditSinkDegraded, AuditSinkUnreachable, AuditSinkRecovered}, transition_at. Fresh Runner boot with SOA_RUNNER_AUDIT_SINK_FAILURE_MODE=<state> emits exactly one matching event (the implicit transition from healthy). Pagination via after/next_after/has_more; audit:read scope required.

SV-MEM-STATE-01.name: Memory state observability
SV-MEM-STATE-01.assertion: GET /memory/state?session_id=<sid> returns 200 with body conforming to schemas/memory-state-response.schema.json when memory.enabled=true. Returns 501 memory-disabled when Agent Card carries memory.enabled=false. Byte-identity excludes generated_at. Not-a-side-effect: reads MUST NOT trigger consolidation or advance aging clocks.

SV-BUD-PROJ-01.name: Budget projection observability
SV-BUD-PROJ-01.assertion: GET /budget/projection?session_id=<sid> returns 200 with body conforming to schemas/budget-projection-response.schema.json. safety_factor always 1.15. cold_start_baseline_active reflects cold vs warm session state. Byte-identity excludes generated_at. Not-a-side-effect: reads MUST NOT advance counters or fire cancellations.

SV-REG-OBS-01.name: Tool Registry observability (dynamic registration)
SV-REG-OBS-01.assertion: GET /tools/registered returns 200 with body conforming to schemas/tools-registered-response.schema.json. Each entry carries registration_source ∈ {static-fixture, mcp-dynamic}. registry_version is sha256 of JCS(tools[]). Byte-identity excludes generated_at.

SV-MEM-STATE-02.name: Memory state not-a-side-effect invariant
SV-MEM-STATE-02.assertion: Two successive GET /memory/state?session_id=<sid> calls against a quiescent session return byte-identical bodies when generated_at is excluded from the comparison. Consolidation not triggered, aging clocks unchanged, no audit rows, no StreamEvents.

SV-BUD-PROJ-02.name: Budget projection not-a-side-effect invariant
SV-BUD-PROJ-02.assertion: Two successive GET /budget/projection?session_id=<sid> calls against a quiescent session return byte-identical bodies when generated_at is excluded. Token counters unchanged, no cancellation fired, no audit rows.

SV-REG-OBS-02.name: Tool Registry not-a-side-effect invariant
SV-REG-OBS-02.assertion: Two successive GET /tools/registered calls in a quiescent registry return byte-identical bodies when generated_at is excluded. registry_version unchanged between reads.

SV-STR-OBS-01.name: Minimum StreamEvent observability channel
SV-STR-OBS-01.assertion: GET /events/recent?session_id=<sid>&after=<id>&limit=<n> returns 200 with body conforming to schemas/events-recent-response.schema.json. Events carry event_id + sequence + type (∈ 27-value enum incl. PreToolUseOutcome/PostToolUseOutcome per §19.4 errata) + session_id + emitted_at. Pagination via next_after/has_more. Byte-identity excludes generated_at. Not-a-side-effect on reads.

§17.1#jwt.title: A2A JWT algorithm, key discovery, replay, etag

§14.1#stream.title: StreamEvent schema + sequencing + CrashEvent + per-type payload

§14.3#subscription.title: Runner stream subscription contract (SSE, mTLS, resume, backpressure)

§19#governance.title: Governance, stability, versioning, deprecation, errata, HITL

execution_order.notes: Tests ordered by dependency: encoding/static configuration first, then security headers, auth, enrollment; envelope and subscribe require auth; content safety and prompts require envelope; handoff and SI are terminal phases. Every ID listed below is literal — no glob or range expansion.

phases.name: Static Configuration (AGENTS.md, Registry, Governance — includes SI-gated static checks)
